data.content: Implementation already on main at commit 7b17b3e038c0. buildLeaderboard in lease-audit-helpers.ts filters agents via meetsLeaderboardThresholds (>=10 attempts AND >25% success rate). Mean, margin, and totalN computed from qualified set only. Steps with no qualified agents are omitted. 33 tests pass in lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts covering: <10 attempts excluded, <=25% excluded, >25% included, qualified-only margin/totalN, runner-up exclusion, and all-filtered omission.
